raw_consumer_statement: I purchased roofing supplies on XXXX shipped via XXXX The packages were delivered to wrong address. I opened a dispute and upon completion of investigation I received a letter with a photograph of house products were delivered too. It was not my home, which i informed them of this and was told I would be liable. Fortunately several weeks after expected delivery the ederly non English speaking neighbors for which my packages were delivered sent one of their children over when he came for a visit. I had to go pick them up resulting in injury. For litigation purposes XXXX is requesting this letter. I have made 4 attempts since XX/XX/XXXX requesting this letter and also attempted to retrieve it online. Dispute number is XXXX
